'''Mageye''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Taboon]]. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], he was caught in a crossfire between the [[Thig Brothers]] and [[Jodo Kast]]. Mageye was dropped by the [[Weequay/Legends|Weequays]] who'd been carrying him and rolled on top of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Zardra]], prompting her to stick a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] in his mouth rather than be suffocated. Mageye's [[Death/Legends|death]] prompted [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] to place a 50,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on Zardra's head, which was soon picked up by [[Gorm (cyborg)|Gorm]] the Dissolver.
